Air Suspension Issues.title: Air Suspension Compressor Noise
Air Suspension Issues.issue: Loud compressor operation during height adjustment

Air Suspension Issues.title: Air Spring Pressure Loss
Air Suspension Issues.issue: Vehicle dropping lower over time due to air leak
Air Suspension Issues.fix: Inspect air lines, replace leaking air spring or seal

Air Suspension Issues.title: Height Sensor Calibration Issue
Air Suspension Issues.issue: Uneven ride height or height sensor faults
Air Suspension Issues.fix: Recalibrate height sensors via diagnostic tool

Battery & Charging Issues.title: Charge Port Door Sticking
Battery & Charging Issues.issue: Charge port door won't open or close smoothly
Battery & Charging Issues.fix: Replace charge port door motor and lubricate contacts

Battery & Charging Issues.title: Slow DC Fast Charging Speed
Battery & Charging Issues.issue: DC fast charging speed reduced to 50-70% of normal
Battery & Charging Issues.fix: Update OBC firmware, verify thermal management

Battery & Charging Issues.title: Battery Temperature Warning at Startup
Battery & Charging Issues.issue: Battery temperature warning appears on cold mornings
Battery & Charging Issues.fix: Verify battery thermal management system operation, no parts needed

Battery & Charging Issues.title: Battery Degradation Accelerated
Battery & Charging Issues.issue: Faster than expected battery capacity loss
Battery & Charging Issues.fix: BMS reset, battery diagnostics, possible pack replacement if defective

Motor & Drive System Issues.title: Motor Grinding or Whining Noise
Motor & Drive System Issues.issue: Unusual noise from motor during acceleration
Motor & Drive System Issues.fix: Diagnose motor condition, possible motor replacement

Motor & Drive System Issues.title: Torque Vectoring Malfunction
Motor & Drive System Issues.issue: Dual motor torque distribution not working
Motor & Drive System Issues.fix: Update motor controller firmware, verify inverter operation

Exterior & Panel Issues.title: Door Alignment & Panel Gaps
Exterior & Panel Issues.issue: Front door doesn't align properly, large gaps at seams
Exterior & Panel Issues.fix: Adjust door hinges, align panel gaps to specification

Exterior & Panel Issues.title: Tonneau Cover Sticking or Misaligned
Exterior & Panel Issues.issue: Tonneau cover doesn't open/close smoothly or sits uneven
Exterior & Panel Issues.fix: Lubricate guides, adjust cover alignment, replace motor if needed

Exterior & Panel Issues.title: Window Regulator Malfunction
Exterior & Panel Issues.issue: Side windows don't move smoothly or stick

Electronics & Infotainment Issues.title: Touchscreen Freezing or Unresponsive
Electronics & Infotainment Issues.issue: Infotainment system becomes unresponsive or crashes
Electronics & Infotainment Issues.fix: Update MCU firmware, factory reset if needed, possible MCU replacement

Electronics & Infotainment Issues.title: Bluetooth Connectivity Issues
Electronics & Infotainment Issues.issue: Phone won't pair or keeps disconnecting
Electronics & Infotainment Issues.fix: Update MCU firmware, unpair/repair device, reset Bluetooth module

Electronics & Infotainment Issues.title: Software Update Stuck or Failed
Electronics & Infotainment Issues.issue: OTA update stalls or fails to install
Electronics & Infotainment Issues.fix: Perform hard reset, manual update via service mode, possible MCU replacement

Climate Control Issues.title: Heat Pump Not Heating in Cold Weather
Climate Control Issues.issue: Vehicle won't heat efficiently in cold weather
symptoms: Heater fan runs but no warm air
Climate Control Issues.fix: Update heat pump firmware, verify refrigerant charge, possible compressor replacement

Climate Control Issues.title: A/C Compressor Cycling On/Off Frequently
Climate Control Issues.issue: Air conditioning compressor cycles too often, inconsistent cooling
Climate Control Issues.fix: Check refrigerant level, verify pressure sensors, possible compressor replacement

Lighting Issues.title: Headlight Module Malfunction
Lighting Issues.issue: One or both headlights out or dim
Lighting Issues.fix: Replace headlight module, verify wiring connection

Lighting Issues.title: Wiper Motor Malfunction
Lighting Issues.issue: Wipers don't work or move intermittently
Lighting Issues.fix: Replace wiper motor, check wiper linkage for obstruction
